description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with a complex roofline composed of several angled and stepped sections. The front facade is characterized by a prominent bay window above a recessed entryway, flanked by large rectangular windows that provide ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some octagonal accent windows adding visual interest. The rear of the house includes a projecting bay and expansive window panels, suggesting open interior spaces. The overall structure is boxy yet dynamic, with geometric forms and a focus on maximizing window area.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a stepped roofline, large windows, and a prominent bay window entry. The exterior is smooth and light-colored, with geometric forms and a contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway recessed beneath a large bay window, flanked by symmetrical rectangular windows and accented by an octagonal window.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the stepped, angular roofline and a large window section, with minimal decorative features.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a projecting bay section and wide window panels, emphasizing openness and light.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the multi-level roof structure and a single large window, with fewer architectural details.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and large rectangular panels
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway beneath a bay window, no visible steps or porch, minimalistic modern design
